item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Prioritas masyarakat tidak selalu berarti mengorbankan hak individu, tetapi justru menjaga keadilan agar semua lapisan bisa berkembang bersama.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-first priority and remains broadly supportive by the end, but narrows the claim into a rights-compatible social-justice frame. Agent B consistently opposes subordinating individual liberties to group interests, while acknowledging social welfare, communal responsibility, and the Indonesian concern about protecting minorities.
